title: Disorder Realization Schema
description: Defines the structure for a single disorder realization in the 1D tight-binding model. Captures the disorder strength (W), system size (L), and the unique realization index used for reproducibility.

disorder_strength_W.description: Disorder strength parameter W. On-site potentials are drawn from U(-W/2, W/2).

system_size_L.description: Number of sites in the 1D chain (matrix dimension L x L).

realization_index.description: Unique index for this specific realization within the batch for a given (W, L). Used to track provenance.

seed.description: The random seed used to generate this specific realization's on-site potentials. Ensures exact reproducibility.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this realization was generated.

on_site_potentials_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the on-site potential array for integrity verification.
